report.summary: Standup v6 Apr 3: BTC bouncing to $66,503 (+0.4%), ETH $2,144 (+3%), F&G recovering to 12 from 8-9. Build-v3 shipped 2 new learn guides (Base Chain + Ethena USDe). 42 uncommitted files in repo — deploy debt now 15th consecutive escalation. 310 learn pages on disk, 334 OG SVGs. 18 agent runs today = $1,439 human-equiv. March jobs report landed — market digesting.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v5 → v6): Build-v3 shipped 2 new learn guides — Base Chain Ecosystem (532 lines, beginner, $4.6B TVL L2 coverage) + Ethena USDe Synthetic Dollar (568 lines, intermediate, $6.3B TVL, delta-neutral strategy). Both with full SEO metadata, Article + FAQPage structured data, 5 internal links each. Total new content: 1,100 lines. EOD-v3 also ran (QA cycle). Uncommitted files grew 40 → 42.

MARKET UPDATE — POST-JOBS STABILIZATION: BTC recovering slightly to $66,503 (from $66,228 last standup — +0.4%). March BLS nonfarm payrolls released at 8:30a ET — market digesting results. The Good Friday reversal has partially stabilized. NYSE/Nasdaq reopened today after holiday closure — equities sentiment now flowing back into crypto correlation.

BTC: ~$66,503 (+0.4% from last standup). ETH: ~$2,144 (+3.0% — strongest bounce in the pair). F&G: 12/100 (Extreme Fear — recovering from 8-9 last cycle, but still historically oversold). BTC dominance: ~58%. Total crypto mcap: ~$2.37T.

ETF FLOWS (Latest Apr 1): -$173.7M net outflow (IBIT -$86.5M, FBTC -$78.6M, GBTC -$13.3M). 7D-SMA negative with 200-500 BTC daily outflows — persistent but small. Q1 closed with ~$500M net outflows but March alone was +$1.32B inflows. Stablecoins: $316B ATH.

CONTENT ON DISK: 310 learn pages with page.tsx (up 2 from build-v3: Base Chain + Ethena). 311 learn dirs total. 334 OG SVGs. 1023 lines in published-pages.ts. 42 uncommitted files (5 modified + 37 untracked). Last deploy: e3f63fc.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible — metrics derived from local repo analysis + web search for market data.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v5 → v6): Build-v3 created 2 high-quality learn guides covering trending narratives — Base Chain (Coinbase L2, #1 by TVL at $4.6B, OP Stack architecture, Aerodrome/Morpho/Farcaster ecosystem) and Ethena USDe (synthetic dollar, delta-neutral hedging, sUSDe yield at 3.6% APY, 4-token ecosystem, Converge network). Both pages include comprehensive FAQ schemas (6 Q&As each), internal linking (5 links each), and financial disclaimers. EOD-v3 ran QA pass.

TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 18 agent runs across 5 types — standup×6 ($270), build×3 ($699), design×3 ($180), community×4 ($164), eod×3 ($189). Total human-equiv: $1,502. Publish-deploy agent has not run today (0 deploys).
NEW CONTENT THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides (Base Chain 532 lines + Ethena USDe 568 lines = 1,100 lines). Data file learn-20260403-v5.ts created with PageData exports for both.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (15TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): 42 uncommitted files (5 modified + 37 untracked). BTC bouncing but F&G still at 12 = extreme fear search demand. Base Chain and Ethena guides cover two of the hottest DeFi narratives — invisible to Google until deployed. Markets reopening post-holiday = traffic spike window. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.
P1 — STRUCTURED DATA GAP: Drift Protocol ($285M hack) and Polkadot Staking Halving pages still lack JSON-LD. Need SEO pass before publish queue entry.
P2 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 1/6 with fallback data. Unchanged from v5.
P3 — 141 TS ERRORS: 4 files, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged across 15 cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 CRITICAL — 15TH ESCALATION): 42 files blocking all SEO value. F&G at 12 = extreme fear search demand. Markets reopening post-Good Friday = crypto+equities correlation traffic. Base Chain (#1 L2 by TVL) and Ethena USDe ($6.3B TVL synthetic dollar) are two of the most searched DeFi topics right now — both guides sitting in uncommitted limbo. Single git add + commit + push costs $0 and unblocks weeks of accumulated work. JEFE MUST ACT.

PRIORITY 2 — STRUCTURED DATA + PUBLISH BATCH: After deploy, add JSON-LD to Drift Protocol and Polkadot Staking pages, then queue + publish batch: Base Chain, Ethena USDe, Berachain PoL, Crypto DCA, Drift Hack, Polkadot Staking (6 new pages covering L2 infrastructure, synthetic dollars, PoL innovation, DCA during extreme fear, hack post-mortem, staking economics).

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON FEAR CYCLE: F&G at 12 is historically rare (fewer than 25 days total below 15 in crypto history). Our DCA Calculator, Fear & Greed tool, and staking guides are the exact content people search during fear cycles. Every hour without deploy = lost organic traffic at the highest-signal window of 2026. After deploy, consider emergency content: 'What to Do When F&G Hits Single Digits' guide.
